seoTitle: Rokeby vs Roland — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Rokeby and Roland. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rokeby and Roland.
heading: Rokeby vs Roland — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rokeby, Tasmania and Roland, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Roland has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Rokeby (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rokeby or Roland safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rokeby has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Roland scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rokeby scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Roland scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rokeby or Roland?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Roland has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
